items.name: init
items.title: moduix init
items.description: Initialize shadcn for moduix and install the shared foundation files.

items.name: core
items.title: moduix core
items.description: Shared styles, utilities, and icons for moduix registry components.
items.docs: Import '@/lib/moduix/styles/style.css' once in your app entry. Optionally import '@/lib/moduix/styles/reset.css' before it.
